notes: Edit names/aliases/phones anytime. Clients get a warm greeting and go through when Adam is free; when busy, schedule a callback. Family/VIP same put-through when free. Agents are not listed here — ask brokerage then put through.

family.notes: Immediate family circle — put through when free

associates.notes: Add TC partners, close broker friends, etc.

clients.notes: Add buyer/seller client first names here so the receptionist greets them warmly
